name: 包括的テスト作成・動作保証性向上

description: Baseline: 154 plan-mode + 139 sandbox = 293 total tests

asi.hypothesis: baseline measurement

description: +175 tests: plan-mode 276, sandbox 156, zip-repo 36 = 468 total

asi.hypothesis: Add comprehensive tests: plan-mode edge cases + sandbox coverage + zip-repo extraction
asi.changes: plan-mode: isSafeCommand exhaustive safe/dangerous patterns, hashContent collisions, extractProposedPlan edge cases, buildBlockReason additional cases, sanitizePlanTools edge cases, getConfigPath, normalizeConfig edge cases, PlanState mutation tests, full workflow integration. sandbox: resolveSafeRealPath, assertMacSandboxAvailable, buildMacSeatbeltPolicy gitdir/tempdir/read_only_deny sections, buildSandboxEnv LC_ALL, empty command rejection, read_only writableRoots constraint, symlink escape detection. zip-repo: extracted formatFileSize/buildZipPath/escapeAppleScriptPath/buildClipboardScript/parseDirtyFiles with comprehensive tests.

description: +43 tests: sandbox approvals dedicated test file + CI unified config = 511 total

asi.hypothesis: Add dedicated approvals.test.ts + CI improvements

asi.hypothesis: Add dedicated index.test.ts for truncateForLlm

description: Documentation + CI + unified test scripts. 595 total tests maintained.

asi.hypothesis: Documentation and CI improvements, package.json test scripts unified
asi.changes: Added TESTING.md, unified test scripts in root package.json, added autoresearch.ideas.md

description: +37 tests: plan-mode index.ts extension hooks via mock API = 632 total

asi.hypothesis: Test plan-mode/index.ts extension hooks via mock ExtensionAPI
asi.approach: Created mock ExtensionAPI with vi.mock for peer deps, tested tool_call/context/before_agent_start/agent_end/turn_end/model_select/thinking_level_select/session_start hooks + /plan, /plan-model, /plan-thinking commands + appendEntry/sendUserMessage tracking

description: +34 tests: sandbox index.ts extension hooks via mock API = 666 total

asi.approach: Created mock ExtensionAPI with vi.mock for peer deps + macSeatbelt/pathPolicy modules, tested session_start (--no-sandbox, --sandbox-mode, danger_full_access approval/rejection, unsafe workspace root), session_shutdown reset, user_bash block/allow, /sandbox status, /sandbox-mode command (change/approve/reject/reset), tool execute cases (no-sandbox, sandbox unavailable, danger_full_access), status bar, lifecycle
asi.hypothesis: Test sandbox/index.ts extension hooks via mock API — largest coverage gap at 10.69%
key_tested_behaviors: danger_full_access approval flow at session_start and /sandbox-mode
user_bash block/allow based on mode and approval state

description: +29 tests: plan-mode index.ts uncovered command/thinking/model branches = 695 total

asi.approach: Added tests for uncovered branches in plan-mode/index.ts: /plan-model sub-commands (plan set, plan save, main save, clear main/plan, invalid, no model), /plan-thinking sub-commands (plan set, plan save, main save, clear main/plan, plan invalid, plan mode thinking switch, main mode no-op), model_select plan mode path, thinking_level_select plan mode path, mode transition model/thinking config preservation
asi.hypothesis: Cover remaining uncovered branches in plan-mode/index.ts (61.37% branches → higher)

description: +8 tests: sandbox index.ts Case 4 sandboxed execution + resolveRealPaths fallback = 703 total

asi.approach: Added tests for sandbox/index.ts Case 4 (sandboxed execution) — the biggest remaining coverage gap at lines 189-221. Used mock isMacSandboxAvailable=true + mock runSandboxedShellMac to exercise the full sandboxed execution path including: success with stdout/stderr, non-zero exit code, empty output (no output), dangerous command approval flow (approve/reject), safe command no-prompt. Also added resolveRealPaths error fallback test.
asi.hypothesis: Cover sandbox/index.ts Case 4 (sandboxed execution path lines 189-221) and resolveRealPaths catch (lines 426-427)

description: +11 tests: sandbox buildCurrentPolicy paths + Case 2 inline approval = 706 total

asi.approach: Added tests for sandbox/index.ts remaining uncovered paths: buildCurrentPolicy read_only and danger_full_access paths (lines 109, 118), Case 2 inline approval flow via /sandbox-mode command. Had to handle module cache state between tests by explicitly switching modes.
asi.hypothesis: Cover sandbox/index.ts buildCurrentPolicy read_only/danger_full_access paths and Case 2 inline approval
asi.note: Module caching across tests required explicit mode switching via /sandbox-mode command before asserting buildCurrentPolicy behavior

description: +20 tests: SBPL policy snapshot tests + structural invariants = 726 total

asi.approach: Added SBPL policy snapshot tests for all policy patterns (read_only, workspace_write, danger_full_access, with homebrew, with network, with gitdirs, with isolated temp, with multiple roots, with writable subdirs). Added structural invariant tests (deny default vs allow default, version 1, process-exec/fork, protected paths .git/.codex/.agents, same-sandbox signal/process-info restrictions). Generated 947-line snapshot file.
asi.hypothesis: Snapshot testing + structural invariants for SBPL policies to reduce maintenance cost and catch unintended security regressions
asi.maintenance_benefit: Any SBPL change will fail snapshots, forcing intentional review of security-relevant changes

description: +7 tests: plan-mode remaining branch coverage (null model, invalid ref, plan mode setModel, thinking same-level skip) = 733 total

asi.approach: Covered remaining uncovered branches in plan-mode/index.ts: /plan-model plan (no arg) with null model (line 273), /plan-model plan <invalid> (line 258-259), /plan-model plan <model> in plan mode triggers setModel (lines 263-265), /plan-thinking clear invalid and unknown sub-command (line 398), thinking_level_select same-level skip in main and plan mode (lines 560, 564)
asi.hypothesis: Cover remaining uncovered branches in plan-mode/index.ts
asi.note: sandbox/index.ts lines 159-170 (inline danger_full_access approval in tool execute) analyzed as defensive dead code — the invariant currentMode=danger_full_access → fullAccessApproved=true is maintained by session_start and /sandbox-mode handlers. This is intentional defense-in-depth, not a test gap.

description: +12 tests: isSafeCommand property-based tests (fast-check) with 12 invariants = 745 total

asi.approach: Added property-based tests (fast-check) for isSafeCommand covering 12 invariants: safe prefixes with benign args, shell meta-char rejection, redirect stripping monotonicity, determinism, destructive keywords, package manager installs, git mutating vs read-only commands, editors, find destructive flags, output redirects, newline injection. Ran 200 iterations per property.
asi.hypothesis: Property-based testing for isSafeCommand to catch semantic regressions from LLM code changes
asi.maintenance_benefit: fast-check generates thousands of random inputs per test run, catching edge cases that fixed tests miss. Any semantic change to isSafeCommand will be caught by these invariants.

description: CI: coverage thresholds + artifact uploads + vitest.config. 745 tests maintained.

asi.approach: Added CI infrastructure: coverage threshold enforcement (plan-mode >=95%, sandbox >=89%), JSON coverage reports, artifact uploads, vitest.config.ts for both modules, test-summary aggregation job
asi.hypothesis: CI coverage enforcement prevents coverage regression from LLM code changes
ci_changes: vitest.config.ts added to plan-mode and sandbox
asi.maintenance_benefit: Any PR that drops coverage will automatically fail CI, catching regressions early

description: +5 tests: plan-mode remaining branch coverage (model-not-found, setModel-fail, fallback restore, shortcut, thinking-level) = 750 total

asi.approach: Covered previously uncovered branches in plan-mode/index.ts: trySetModel with model-not-found in registry (lines 53-54), trySetModel with setModel returning false/missing API key (lines 60-61), exitPlanMode fallback model restore when main model fails (line 136), Super+P shortcut handler invocation (line 398), thinking_level_select in plan mode with different level updating config (line 564)
asi.hypothesis: Cover remaining uncovered branches in plan-mode/index.ts

description: +2 tests: sandbox Case 2 inline approval (approve + reject) via session_shutdown state = 752 total

asi.approach: Added 2 tests for sandbox/index.ts Case 2 inline approval path (lines 159-170): (1) session_shutdown resets fullAccessApproved but leaves currentMode as danger_full_access → execute triggers inline confirm prompt → approve → runs; (2) same but confirm rejected → throws error
asi.hypothesis: Cover sandbox/index.ts Case 2 inline approval path (lines 159-170) via session_shutdown state manipulation
asi.remaining_gap: Line 118 (dangerFullAccessPolicy in buildCurrentPolicy switch) is dead code — danger_full_access always goes through Case 2 unsandboxed execution

description: +4 tests: macSeatbelt spawn error paths (ENOENT, already-aborted, timeout SIGKILL, output limit) via mock = 756 total

asi.approach: Created spawnError.test.ts with vi.mock('node:child_process') to cover runSandboxedShellMac error paths: (1) spawn ENOENT error → resolves with stderr, (2) already-aborted AbortSignal → immediate abort, (3) timeout → SIGTERM kill sequence, (4) output limit exceeded → truncated output
asi.hypothesis: Cover macSeatbelt.ts runSandboxedShellMac error paths (spawn error, already-aborted, timeout SIGKILL, output limit) via child_process.spawn mocking
asi.remaining_gaps: macSeatbelt lines 715-722 (maxOutputBytes per-stream cap), 745-746 (stderr output cap), 763 (SIGKILL grace timer)

description: +3 tests: macSeatbelt stderr output limit + abort-during-execution via spawn mock = 759 total

asi.approach: Extended spawnError.test.ts with 3 more tests: (1) stderr output limit exceeded → truncation, (2) stderr partial keep preserves content before limit, (3) abort signal fires during execution (not pre-aborted). Also renamed existing test to clarify stdout vs stderr.
asi.hypothesis: Cover macSeatbelt.ts stderr output limit handling (lines 715-722) and abort-during-execution path via spawn mocking
asi.remaining_gaps: macSeatbelt lines 605-606 (isolated HOME), 745-746 (killProcessGroupForce), 763 (SIGKILL timer) — all require 5s+ waits

description: +8 tests: plan-mode context hook content types + agent_end edge cases + model_select branches = 767 total

asi.approach: Added 8 tests for plan-mode/index.ts branch coverage: (1) context hook with non-array content, (2) non-text part type, (3) non-string text field, (4) user role messages skipped; (5-6) agent_end with no assistant messages and non-array content; (7-8) model_select same-ref branch and suppressModelSelectPersist indirect test

description: +8 tests: plan-mode tool_call input type edge cases + pathPolicy HOME undefined = 775 total

asi.approach: Added 8 tests total: (plan-mode) 6 tool_call input type edge cases covering ternary branches in appendEntry — input.path/command as number/undefined, input defaulting to {}, command captured correctly; (sandbox) 2 pathPolicy tests for HOME=undefined edge case
asi.coverage_improvement: plan-mode/index.ts branches 89.41%→91%, overall branches 91.47%→93.02%. pathPolicy.ts branches expected to reach ~96%+
asi.hypothesis: Cover plan-mode tool_call appendEntry ternary branches (lines 416,434,448-449) and pathPolicy HOME-undefined branches (lines 92,128)

description: +10 tests: zip-repo handler (clean/dirty/error paths) + macSeatbelt relative gitdir = 786 total

asi.approach: Added 10 tests total: (sandbox) 1 test for resolveGitdirPaths relative gitdir path resolution; (zip-repo) 9 handler tests via execFileAsync mock covering: clean repo success, dirty repo + overlay, not-a-git-repo error, git archive failure, clipboard failure, git status failure (treated as clean), size formatting, no dirty files after ls-files, command registration
asi.hypothesis: Cover zip-repo handler (lines 62-140) via execFileAsync mocking — was at 20.4% line coverage, the biggest uncovered module

description: +4 tests: zip-repo non-Error catch branches + stat failure = 790 total. zip-repo now 100% all metrics.

asi.approach: Added 4 zip-repo handler tests covering catch block String(e) branches: (1) non-Error thrown from git rev-parse, (2) non-Error from git archive, (3) non-Error from osascript clipboard, (4) stat fails → 'unknown size' fallback
asi.coverage_improvement: zip-repo/index.ts branches 78.57%→100%. All metrics now 100% (Statements, Branches, Functions, Lines)
asi.hypothesis: Cover zip-repo catch block instanceof Error vs String(e) ternary branches

description: +5 tests: plan-model status branches (null model, model-not-found, unset, whitespace args) = 795 total

asi.approach: Added 5 tests for plan-mode/index.ts branch coverage: (1) plan-model status with null model → '(none)', (2) main model set but not in registry → '✗', (3) plan model set but not in registry → '✗', (4) no main model (config empty) → '(unset)', (5) args with extra whitespace parsed correctly
asi.hypothesis: Cover plan-model status display ternary branches (lines 193-196) and args parsing (line 305)
asi.note: Test for 'unset' state requires deleting persisted config from previous tests (state leak via filesystem)

description: +4 tests: plan-mode suppress flag branches + sandbox status bar icons = 799 total

asi.approach: Added 4 tests total: (plan-mode) 2 tests for suppressModelSelectPersist/suppressThinkingSelectPersist branches — mock setModel triggers model_select hook during trySetModel, mock setThinkingLevel triggers thinking_level_select during session_start; (sandbox) 2 status bar tests — danger_full_access shows ⚠️ icon, workspace_write shows 🔒 icon
asi.hypothesis: Cover suppressModelSelectPersist (line 539) and suppressThinkingSelectPersist (line 555) branches by making mock hooks trigger synchronously during mode transitions

description: +74 tests: security regression invariants (destructive cmds, SBPL deny-default, secret env sanitization, safe cmd allowlist) = 873 total

asi.approach: Created security.test.ts with 74 security regression tests organized as 4 invariant groups: (1) isSafeCommand rejects 33 destructive commands (rm, sudo, package managers, editors, shell injection, newline injection, git mutating), (2) SBPL policies verify deny-by-default for read_only/workspace_write and allow-default for danger_full_access, (3) buildSandboxEnv removes 10 secret env vars (OPENAI_API_KEY, GITHUB_TOKEN, etc.) + verifies HOME isolation, PATH sanitization, GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0, (4) 19 safe commands always allowed (git status, ls, cat, grep, etc.)
asi.hypothesis: Security regression tests prevent critical security holes from LLM code changes — destructive commands, SBPL policy regressions, secret leaks, PATH injection
asi.security_value: 74 invariants that catch security regressions automatically — more valuable than branch coverage

description: +4 tests: plan-mode undefined args + no model/thinking config branches = 877 total

[] branch, (3) /plan-thinking handler with undefined args → covers ?? [] branch, (4) enterPlanMode without main model configured → savedMainModel undefined branch
asi.hypothesis: Cover plan-mode enterPlanMode/exitPlanMode branches for no-main-model and no-thinking-config scenarios
asi.remaining_branches: Lines 50,84-94,123,140-141,416 — all defensive paths requiring complex mock state
